headline: Air Products and Chemicals Stock: Is APD Underperforming the Basic Materials Sector?
summary: Air Products and Chemicals has underperformed the Basic Materials sector over the past year, but analysts are cautiously optimistic about the stock’s prospects.

headline: Zacks Industry Outlook Highlights Air Products and Chemicals, Albemarle and DuPont de Nemours
summary: ALB, DD and APD lean on cost cuts and price hikes as soft demand in Europe and China pressures the Diversified Chemicals industry.
